snippet.title: Steckerlfischfiasko | Offizieller Trailer
snippet.description:
Steckerlfischfiasko – ab 13. August 2026 im Kino!

Eberhofer (Sebastian Bezzel) im Neubau, Birkenberger (Simon Schwarz) im Saustall und Susi (Lisa Maria Potthoff) (fast) im Bürgermeisteramt – und als wäre das Chaos in Niederkaltenkirchen nicht schon perfekt, geht auch noch die Oma (Enzi Fuchs) auf Kur! Gut, dass die neue Haushaltshilfe Julika (Lara Mandoki) ganz zur Freude von Papa (Eisi Gulp) und Leopold (Gerhard Wittmann) für Ordnung auf dem Eberhofer-Hof sorgt, während Franz sich wohl oder übel zwischen Susis Wahlkampf und dem neuen Hobby von Sohn Paul zurechtfinden muss. Als der örtliche „Steckerlfischkönig“ plötzlich mausetot auf dem neu errichteten Golfplatz liegt, kommt das dem Dorfsheriff deshalb gar nicht so ungelegen. Gemeinsam mit Rudi Birkenberger macht er sich an die Ermittlungen. Prompt geraten die beiden Spezln in eine ausgewachsene Familienfehde zweier Volksfestclans. „Romeo und Julia“ in Niederbayern!

snippet.title: The Harry Potter Reboot Keeps Getting WORSE...
snippet.description:
The Harry Potter HBO trailer just dropped and I have a lot to say...

From the controversial casting of Snape, to the $100 million per episode budget, to why I think this reboot is going to do more harm than good to one of the most beloved franchises of all time. we are getting into all of it!!

I also compare the reboot to the original Harry Potter films and explain why older movies felt so different visually, and why so many modern shows now look flat, grey, and overly processed. This isn’t just a Harry Potter problem, it’s happening across Hollywood...

If you love movies, acting, or complaining about the state of Hollywood, this one’s for you!

Business inquiries - marina@night.co

Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/marinamcbain
TikTok - https://www.tiktok.com/@marinaswrld 

Thanks for watching :p

DEEP AFRO SOUL_Music-Lyrics: Eir.M

🔥Follow me on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/6bP2tPAG5vnK0p1G1kYKa7?si=T2sNZ_EqQzOwLGDwWMBtPw

Oh my angel, lost in time...
Through the storm, through the night...
Oh my angel, come back home
I’m still here, all alone

I tell myself you’ll walk back in
Like you forgot something again
I still reach, but nothing's there
Just empty space, and missing air...

I’m stuck reliving what you said
I hear your voice inside my head
I keep the things you left behind
Like they could bring you back in time

Oh my angel, lost in time...
Through the storm,  through the night...
Oh my angel, come back home
I’m still here, all alone

You said “it’s done” like it was small
Like we were never real at all...
You made it easy, I paid the cost
You walked out, I was left with loss
I don’t chase you,  I don’t call
 I still turn when footsteps fall
And for a second, I believe it’s true…
Then realize… I don’t have you 

Oh my angel, 

Now I’m learning 
How to live...
How to forget
How to heal
How to breathe...
Oh my angel, 
Oh angel, 

Angel, 
Angel, 
Maybe you’re fine
Maybe you moved on
Maybe I’m here
just holding on
Oh, my angel...

snippet.title: The Cranberries - Scenes From 'Dreams' (Dir: Peter Scammell / Dolores Uncut)
snippet.description:
Scenes from 'Dreams' (Dir: Peter Scammell / Dolores) Uncut by The Cranberries

On March 18, 1993, Peter Scammell filmed Dolores O'Riordan performing "Dreams" on 35mm film. What you're watching is the full uncut performance, restored to 4K from the original scan. Some moments from this session made the official music video. The rest has been in the archive ever since.

"Dreams" is one of the rare songs to have had three separate music videos made for it, directed by John Maybury, Peter Scammell, and Nico Soultanakis. After "Linger" broke through, the band took the step of re-releasing Dreams, and the Scammell video went into heavy rotation on MTV's 120 Minutes. It became a Top 40 hit in the US and one of the defining songs of the decade.

Designed to give fans a deeper connection to the band's legacy, the "Scenes From" series strips away the traditional music video edit to present raw, 4K performance takes restored from the original film sources.

snippet.title: Katy Perry - The One That Got Away (Lyrics) "in another life i would be your girl"
snippet.description:

Lyrics:

[Verse 1]
Summer after high school, when we first met
We'd make out in your Mustang to Radiohead
And on my eighteenth birthday, we got matching tattoos
Used to steal your parents' liquor and climb to the roof
Talked about our future like we had a clue
Never planned that one day, I'd be losing you

[Chorus]
In another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away

[Verse 2]
I was June, and you were my Johnny Cash
Never one without the other, we made a pact
Sometimes when I miss you, I put those records on, woah
Someone said you had your tattoo removed
Saw you downtown, singing the blues
It's time to face the music, I'm no longer your muse

[Chorus]
But in another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away

[Post-Chorus]
The one
The one
The one
The one that got away

[Bridge]
All this money can't buy me a time machine, no
Can't replace you with a million rings, no
I should've told you what you meant to me, woah
'Cause now I pay the price

[Chorus]
In another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
